# Pull Request

## Summary

## Required Reading

- [ ] Re-read `README.md`
- [ ] Re-read repository-specific architecture, security, philosophy, or
  governance docs relevant to this PR
- [ ] Re-read files directly affected by this PR

## Verification

## Risk

## Self-Review

- [ ] The change is scoped to the issue or stated goal
- [ ] Security, permissions, auditability, AX, UX, and public-facing impact were
  considered
- [ ] CI impact and required status checks were considered
- [ ] Follow-up work is listed or intentionally omitted
